item_gold_coin.name: Gold Coin
item_gold_coin.description: A stamped trade coin accepted across the Marches.

item_old_toolbox.name: Old Toolbox
item_old_toolbox.description: A heavy wooden toolbox stamped with Harrow Venn's maker's mark. The lock has been broken, but most of the tools are still inside.

item_roadside_draught.name: Roadside Draught
item_roadside_draught.description: A bitter green tonic carried by travellers who expect trouble on the road.

item_road_hatchet.name: Road Hatchet
item_road_hatchet.description: A short iron hatchet balanced for clearing brush or ending a roadside argument.

item_traveler_buckler.name: Traveler Buckler
item_traveler_buckler.description: A scarred round shield light enough to carry all day and sturdy enough to turn a desperate blow.
